scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.gate: bun run typecheck && bun run check:sql && bun run scan:secrets && bun run test:unit && bun run test:firmware && bun run e2e && bun run smoke:ops
